subcodes.first_line: There is no doubt that the Name of Beauty—upon Him be the Glory of God—hath purposed through all His deeds the triumph of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شکی نیست که اسمی جمال علیه بهاء الله مقصودش از آنچه بان عامل شده نصرت حق و
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat]
